title: OverlapVerdict
description: Output of one ORDERED-pair call of the Stage-2 overlap judge (epic only-crave-art, 9022). The judge is prompted with an ordered pair (First, Second) and its `relation` is read DIRECTIONALLY as 'First relation Second'. Only duplicates|supersedes|depends_on are surfaceable; the judge defaults to related_distinct when it cannot cite a concrete shared artifact, and abstains when unsure.

relation.description: First <relation> Second. One of the closed set.

shared_artifact.description: The concrete, named shared artifact (config key / schema / file region / entity) that justifies a surfaceable relation; null when none can be cited (→ related_distinct).

confidence.description: The judge's confidence in the relation, 0.0-1.0.

abstain.description: True when the judge is unsure; an abstain in EITHER ordering downgrades the pair (not surfaced).
